tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — lucide icons + Logomark
tasks.description: Add lucide-react-native and a Logomark component wrapping assets/brand/logomark.svg; fonts already wired. Verify: cd mobile && just check.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Avatar tint/initials helper (pure, tested)
tasks.description: Add avatarTints (7 ring hexes) to theme; lib/avatar.ts with deterministic avatarTint + initials; table-driven test. Verify: node --import tsx --test lib/avatar.test.ts.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Avatar component
tasks.description: components/Avatar.tsx: tinted full-radius initials chip, size-scaled font, optional ember glow ring. Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Button — ghost + danger variants + fullWidth
tasks.description: Extend AppButton: variants primary|secondary|ghost|danger + fullWidth; keep existing callers compiling. Verify: just check.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Badge status tag
tasks.description: components/Badge.tsx: tones solid|ember|neutral|muted|danger; mono uppercase default with opt-out; pill shape. Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Input field
tasks.description: components/Input.tsx: themed field, ember focus border, optional trailing addon button. Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Toggle pill switch
tasks.description: components/Toggle.tsx: 44x26 pill, ember on / night-600 off, white sliding knob, switch a11y. Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 7: MemberRow
tasks.description: components/MemberRow.tsx: rank+avatar+name+meta row, spotlight next-up variant, right slot + onPress. Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Poster tile
tasks.description: expo install expo-linear-gradient; components/Poster.tsx: TMDB image with hue-gradient fallback (title or film glyph). Verify: just typecheck.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Stat + SectionLabel
tasks.description: components/Stat.tsx (mono value+caption, accent value) + components/SectionLabel.tsx (mono uppercase tertiary). Verify: just typecheck.
